caption: A woman with dark hair and black-rimmed glasses speaks against a plain dark background. She wears a light green tunic adorned with small red floral embroidery around the neckline and a dark necklace. A thin black lapel microphone is clipped to her garment. Throughout the sequence, she is captured from the chest up, gesturing with her hands to emphasize her speech. Her mouth is open as she talks, and her right hand moves from a slight lift near her chest to a more open gesture toward the side. In the bottom left and right corners of the frames, a small logo featuring a circular emblem and the text "NPTEL" is visible. The scene remains static in terms of location and lighting, focusing entirely on the woman's delivery and hand movements.
